name: Cranberry Fool
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Can of jellied cranberry sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the first three ingredients with a whisk or fork.
2. Add whipped cream or cool whip.
3. Fill parfait or dessert dishes.
4. Chill until set.
5. Garnish with whipped cream and orange slice.
6. May also be used at room temperature as a fruit dip.
